docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $190.00 FILED BY YEE KIM AS TO DEFENDANT GANGER TOMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-21-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-04-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
